mapper.select:
SELECT R.STRRESNAME, R.STRIPADDR , I.STRIFNAME, I.STRIFDESC, I.STRIFSPEED, I.STRIFTYPE, I.STRIFOPERSTATUS , UO.NREN_ID, UO.NREN_NAME, UO.NODE_ID, UO.IF_ID , E.INTERRIDX, E.MODULE_SRL, E.STRRESID, E.STRIFID, E.STRTYPE , E.STRLEVEL, E.STRTITLE, E.STRCONTENT, E.STRGROUPID, E.STRGROUPID1 , E.STRGROUPID2, E.STRGROUPID3, E.STRGROUPID4, E.STRGROUPID5, E.STRGROUPID6 , E.STRGROUPID7, E.STRGROUPID8, E.STRGROUPID9, E.STRGROUPID10, E.DATERAISEDATE , E.DATECLEARDATE, E.DATEREGDATE, E.STRCLEARCHECK, E.STRMEMO, E.STRACKNOWNCHECK , E.STRACKNOWNCHECK_MEMBER_SRL
FROM IP_YD.XE_CVNMS_ERROR E LEFT OUTER JOIN IP_YD.XE_CVNMS_RESOURCE R ON E.STRRESID = R.STRRESID LEFT OUTER JOIN IP_YD.XE_CVNMS_RESOURCE_IF I ON E.STRRESID = I.STRRESID AND E.STRIFID = I.STRIFID LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_PORT_MST PM ON PM.NODE_NUM = I.STRRESID AND PM.IF_NUM = I.STRIFID LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_USER_ORGAN UO ON PM.NODE_ID=UO.NODE_ID AND PM.IF_ID = UO.IF_ID WHERE E.INTERRIDX > #{interrIdx} ORDER BY E.INTERRIDX

SELECT R.STRRESNAME, R.STRIPADDR , I.STRIFNAME, I.STRIFDESC, I.STRIFSPEED, I.STRIFTYPE, I.STRIFOPERSTATUS , UO.NREN_ID, UO.NREN_NAME, UO.NODE_ID, UO.IF_ID , P.STRIFID, P.STRRESID, P.STRTYPEMIN, P.INTTIMESTAMP, P.INTYEAR , P.INTMONTH, P.INTDAY, P.INTHOUR, P.INTMIN, P.INTWEEK , P.INTBANDWIDTH, P.FLTBPSIN, P.FLTBPSOUT, P.FLTPPSIN, P.FLTPPSOUT , P.FLTERRORIN, P.FLTERROROUT, P.FLTDISCARDIN, P.FLTDISCARDOUT, P.FLTUNKNOWN , P.FLTUSAGE, P.FLHCINOCTETS, P.FLHCOUTOCTETS, P.FLHCINUCASTPKTS, P.FLHCOUTUCASTPKTS , P.FLHCINMULTICASTPKTS, P.FLHCOUTMULTICASTPKTS, P.FLHCINBROADCASTPKTS, P.FLHCOUTBROADCASTPKTS, P.FLTBPSINMAX , P.FLTBPSOUTMAX, P.FLTPPSINMAX, P.FLTPPSOUTMAX, P.FLTERRORINMAX, P.FLTERROROUTMAX , P.FLTDISCARDINMAX, P.FLTDISCARDOUTMAX, P.FLTUNKNOWNMAX, P.FLTUSAGEMAX FROM IP_YD.XE_CVNMS_PERF_IF P LEFT OUTER JOIN IP_YD.XE_CVNMS_RESOURCE R ON P.STRRESID = R.STRRESID LEFT OUTER JOIN IP_YD.XE_CVNMS_RESOURCE_IF I ON P.STRRESID = I.STRRESID AND P.STRIFID = I.STRIFID LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_PORT_MST PM ON PM.NODE_NUM = I.STRRESID AND PM.IF_NUM = I.STRIFID LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_USER_ORGAN UO ON PM.NODE_ID=UO.NODE_ID AND PM.IF_ID = UO.IF_ID WHERE P.INTTIMESTAMP > #{inttimestamp} ORDER BY P.INTTIMESTAMP

SELECT STRRESIP, STRRESNAME, STRS_IP, STRS_PORT, STRD_IP , STRD_PORT, STRS_MAC, STRD_MAC, STRPROTOCOL, STRIPV4TOS , STRCHANNEL, STRSENDERIP, STRIN_INTERFACE, STROUT_INTERFACE, STRBYTES_COL , STRCOUNTS, DATEREGDATE FROM IP_YD.XE_SFLOW_LOG WHERE DATEREGDATE > #{dateRegDate}::timestamp ORDER BY DATEREGDATE

SELECT NODE_NUM, NODE_ID, NODE_NM, MODEL_NUM, MODEL_ID , IP_ADDR, MAC_ADDR, ADMIN_YN, PRIMARY_GB, SNMP_VER , SNMP_COMMUNITY, SNMP_PORT, LATITUDE, LONGITUDE, NETCONF_PORT , NETCONF_ID, NETCONF_PW, NETCONF_TYPE, NODE_DIVISION, VENDOR , SFLOW_IP, UP_DATETIME, CHNG_DATETIME, REG_DATETIME, DATA_SOURCE FROM RESOURCE.TB_NODE_MST

SELECT NODE_NUM, NODE_ID, IF_NUM, IF_ID, IF_NM , IF_INDEX, IF_DESC, IF_TYPE, IF_SPEED, IP_ADDR , MAC_ADDR, IF_OPER_STATUS, IP_PREFIX, IF_DIVISTION, CHNG_DATETIME , REG_DATETIME, DATA_SOURCE FROM RESOURCE.TB_PORT_MST

SELECT SRC_NODE_NUM, SRC_NODE_ID, SRC_IF_NUM, SRC_IF_ID, DEST_NODE_NUM , DEST_NODE_ID, DEST_IF_NUM, DEST_IF_ID, LINK_DESC, VLAN , TAG, SRC_IP_ADDR, SRC_MAC_ADDR, DEST_IP_ADDR, DEST_MAC_ADDR , PREFIX, TOPOLOGY, BANDWIDTH, LINK_TYPE, LINK_DIV , CHNG_DATETIME, REG_DATETIME, DATA_SOURCE, CIRCUIT_NUM FROM RESOURCE.TB_BACKBONE_LINK

SELECT INTRESIDX, MODULE_SRL, MEMBER_SRL, STRRESNAME, STRRESID , STRRESTYPE, STRMODELID, STRGROUPID, STRGROUPID1, STRGROUPID2 , STRGROUPID3, STRGROUPID4, STRGROUPID5, STRGROUPID6, STRGROUPID7 , STRGROUPID8, STRGROUPID9, STRGROUPID10, STRTAGS, STRPRIORITY , STRRESMEMO, STRCOLID, STRIPVER, STRIPADDR, STRIPV6ADDR , STRSNMPIPADDR, STRSNMPVER, STRSNMPCOMMUNITY, INTSNMPPORT, INTSNMPTIMEOUT , STRSNMPV3_USERNAME, STRSNMPV3_SECURITYLEVEL, STRSNMPV3_AUTHENTICATIONPROTOCOL, STRSNMPV3_AUTHENTICATIONPASSWORD, STRSNMPV3_PRIVACYPROTOCOL , STRSNMPV3_PRIVACYPASSWORD, STRSNMPV3_CONTEXTNAME, STRENABLED_CPU, STRENABLED_MEM, STRENABLED_DISK , STRSNMPMIB_CPU, STRSNMPMIB_MEM, STRSNMPMIB_DISK, STREVENT_CPU, STREVENT_MEM , STREVENT_DISK, STRSTATUSSNMP, STRENABLEDSNMP, DATEUPTIME, STRSTATUSPING , INTINTERVALPING, INTTIMEOUTPING, STRENABLEDPING, INTLOGRAISECOUNT, INTERRRAISECOUNT , STRCPUCURRENT, STRMEMCURRENT, STRDISKCURRENT, STRRTTCURRENT, INTSENSORPID , STRALIVE, STRCONTACTS, DATEPROBEUPDATEDATE, DATELASTUPDATEDATE, DATEREGDATE FROM IP_YD.XE_CVNMS_RESOURCE

SELECT INTIFIDX, MODULE_SRL, STRRESID, STRIFID, STRIFNAME , STRRESID_A, STRRESID_Z, INTIFINDEX, STRIFDESC, STRIFTYPE , STRIFSPEED, STRIFPHYSADDRESS, STRIFOPERSTATUS, STRIFLIMITBPS, STRIFLIMITBPSC , STRIFLIMITBPSM, STRIFLIMITBPSN, STRIFLIMITBPSW, STRIFERRLEVEL, STRIFIPADDR , STRIFMANPERF, STRIFMANERROR, STRIFCURRENT, STRIFLIMITERR, STRIFMEMO , DATELASTUPDATEDATE, DATEREGDATE FROM IP_YD.XE_CVNMS_RESOURCE_IF
